---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
subtitle: "[Your Name] — [Your Professional Title]"
date: "[Month Year]"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: article
    css: cv-styles.css
---

<style>
.cv-header { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 2rem; border-bottom: 3px solid #2563eb; padding-bottom: 1rem; }
.cv-section { margin-top: 2rem; }
.cv-item { margin-bottom: 1.2rem; }
.cv-item h4 { margin: 0; color: #0f172a; }
.cv-item .org { font-weight: 600; color: #2563eb; }
.cv-item .period { float: right; color: #64748b; font-size: 0.9rem; }
.skill-tag { background: #eff6ff; color: #1e40af; border-radius: 0.4rem; padding: 0.25rem 0.7rem; font-size: 0.85rem; display: inline-block; margin: 0.15rem; }
@media print { .skill-tag { border: 1px solid #2563eb; } }
</style>

:::: {.cv-header}
# [Your Name]

**[Your Professional Title]**  
{{< fa envelope >}} [your-email@example.com] &nbsp;|&nbsp;
{{< fa brands github >}} [GitHub](https://github.com){target="_blank"} &nbsp;|&nbsp;
{{< fa brands linkedin >}} [LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com){target="_blank"} &nbsp;|&nbsp;
{{< fa location-dot >}} [City, Country]
::::

---

:::: {.cv-section}
## {{< fa graduation-cap >}}  Education

:::: {.cv-item}
#### [Degree Name]
[Institution Name]{.org} [Start Year - End Year]{.period}

Relevant modules: [Module], [Module], [Module], [Module], [Module].
::::

:::: {.cv-item}
#### [Degree Name]
[Institution Name]{.org} [Start Year - End Year]{.period}

[Degree result or key achievement]. Dissertation/Capstone: *"[Title]"*
::::
::::

---

:::: {.cv-section}
## {{< fa briefcase >}}  Work Experience

:::: {.cv-item}
#### [Role Title]
[Organization]{.org} [Start - End]{.period}

- [Achievement / contribution]
- [Achievement / contribution]
- [Achievement / contribution]
::::

:::: {.cv-item}
#### [Role Title]
[Organization]{.org} [Start - End]{.period}

- [Achievement / contribution]
- [Achievement / contribution]
- [Achievement / contribution]
::::
::::

---

:::: {.cv-section}
## {{< fa code >}}  Technical Skills

**Languages:**
[Skill]{.skill-tag} [Skill]{.skill-tag} [Skill]{.skill-tag} [Skill]{.skill-tag}

**Core Skills:**
[Skill]{.skill-tag} [Skill]{.skill-tag} [Skill]{.skill-tag} [Skill]{.skill-tag} [Skill]{.skill-tag}

**Data & Visualisation:**
[Skill]{.skill-tag} [Skill]{.skill-tag} [Skill]{.skill-tag} [Skill]{.skill-tag} [Skill]{.skill-tag}

**Tools:**
[Skill]{.skill-tag} [Skill]{.skill-tag} [Skill]{.skill-tag} [Skill]{.skill-tag} [Skill]{.skill-tag}
::::

---

:::: {.cv-section}
## {{< fa certificate >}}  Certifications

| Certification | Issuer | Year |
|---|---|---|
| [Certification] | [Issuer] | [Year] |
| [Certification] | [Issuer] | [Year] |
| [Certification] | [Issuer] | [Year] |
::::

---

:::: {.cv-section}
## {{< fa star >}}  Selected Projects

| Project | Description | Stack |
|---|---|---|
| [Project Title] | [Project summary] | [Stack] |
| [Project Title] | [Project summary] | [Stack] |
| [Project Title] | [Project summary] | [Stack] |
::::

---

:::: {.cv-section}
## {{< fa globe >}}  Languages

**[Language]** - [Proficiency]  
**[Language]** - [Proficiency]
::::

---

*References available upon request - see [Contact](../contact.qmd) page.*
